name: I-Tranexamic Acid (TXA)
description: I-agent ye-Antifibrinolytic evimbela ukuchithwa kwegazi. Kuyakunciphisa kakhulu ukusweleka ngenxa yokothuka ukopha xa kunikwe kwangoko. Kucetyiswa yi-CoTCCC kubo bonke abonzakeleyo abopha kakhulu okanye abasengozini yokopha okukhulu.
indications: Ukopha okubonakalayo kwangaphandle okanye okukrokrelwayo kwangaphakathi
dose: I-1g IV / IO ngaphezu kwemizuzu ye-10, ilandelwa yi-1g IV / IO kwiiyure ze-8. Ukuba i-IV/IO ayifumaneki: 650mg PO x2 (1.3g iyonke) -- TCCC PO ukhetho.
window: KUFUNEKA ilawulwe kwiiyure ezi-3 zokwenzakala. Ngaphantsi kweeyure ezi-3, i-TXA INAKOKUSA ukubhubha kwabantu-- unganiki.
warnings: Log ixesha lolawulo ngoko nangoko -- window iiyure 3 ukusuka ngexesha lokwenzakala, hayi ixesha lokufika.
Musa ukudibanisa i-IV dose (1g) kunye nedosi yomlomo.

pediatric.dose: 15 mg / kg IV (max 1g). Ubungqina obuvelayo -- sebenzisa isigwebo seklinikhi.

obstetric.note: Iboniswe ukopha emva kokubeleka. Ikhuselekile ekukhulelweni. Idosi efanayo yabantu abadala iyasebenza.

source: JTS CPG: Hemorrhage Control / CoTCCC TCCC Guidelines
